name: claude-usage-analytics
description: Local-first token usage & imputed cost analytics for Claude Code.

plugins.name: claude-usage-analytics
plugins.description: Local-first token usage & imputed cost analytics for Claude Code. Offline parser + SQLite + live dashboard and static reports, with session-kind/SDLC classification, secret redaction, and per-project attribution. Self-bootstrapping Python; near-zero LLM overhead.
